intro: Pinalia sordida, commonly known as the 'slender orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, to exhibit various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and other ailments. The bioactive constituents of P. sordida include phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, P. sordida is often prepared into teas, decoctions, or infusions, which can also be dried and encapsulated for more convenient consumption.
